title: Language Change - "Later" button
scenario: Tapping "Later" on firmware update prompt dismisses language selection list and keeps current language unchanged in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Select a new language from the list (e.g., French).
Observe the firmware update prompt appear.
Tap the "Later" button on the firmware update prompt.
expected: The language selection list is dismissed, and the current language remains unchanged (the language does not switch to the selected one).
